allow: Bash(python -c "import json; nb=json.load\(open\(''experiments/multi_session/multi_session_runner.ipynb''\)\); cells=nb[''cells'']; [print\(f''Cell {i}: id={c.get\(""id"",""?""\)} outputs={len\(c.get\(""outputs"",[]\)\)}''\) for i,c in enumerate\(cells\)]")

Bash(python -c "import json; nb=json.load\(open\(''experiments/multi_session/multi_session_runner.ipynb'', encoding=''utf-8''\)\); cells=nb[''cells'']; [print\(f''Cell {i}: id={c.get\(""id"",""?""\)} nout={len\(c.get\(""outputs"",[]\)\)}''\) for i,c in enumerate\(cells\)]")
